params.SpellDescription: Whenever a spell or ability an opponent controls causes you to discard cards this turn, return those cards from your graveyard to your hand.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Whenever a spell or ability an opponent controls causes you to discard cards this turn, return those cards from your graveyard to your hand.

params.TriggerDescription: When a spell or ability an opponent controls causes you to discard CARDNAME, return CARDNAME from your graveyard to your hand at the beginning of the next end step.
